scripts.version: node scripts/version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.copy-plugin: mkdir -p "/Users/stoller/Documents/Obsidian/Plugin Dev Vault/.obsidian/plugins/simple-scanner" && rm -f "/Users/stoller/Documents/Obsidian/Plugin Dev Vault/.obsidian/plugins/simple-scanner/opencv.js" && cp manifest.json styles.css "/Users/stoller/Documents/Obsidian/Plugin Dev Vault/.obsidian/plugins/simple-scanner/"
